# Tandem Docs

> Agent navigation guide for the published docs site at `https://docs.tandem.ac/`.
> Use these pages to find the relevant docs content on the site itself.

## How to use this

- Start at `/start-here/` if you need the recommended entry path.
- Use the route paths below to open the matching docs page on `docs.tandem.ac`.
- Do not expect repo file paths here; this index is for the published docs site only.

## Start here

- /start-here/ - Choose the right path for CLI, control panel, or source builds.
- /installation/ - Install Tandem and its prerequisites.
- /install-cli-binaries/ - Install the official CLI, engine, and TUI binaries.
- /first-run/ - Follow the first-run checklist.
- /build-from-source/ - Build Tandem from source.

## Desktop and operator docs

- /control-panel/ - Browser control panel and scaffolded app guidance.
- /tui-guide/ - Terminal UI guide.
- /agents-and-sessions/ - Sessions, context, and execution model.
- /agent-teams/ - Agent team architecture and behavior.
- /configuration/ - Providers, keys, and system instructions.
- /headless-service/ - Headless engine service mode.
- /channel-integrations/ - Slack, Discord, Telegram, and related integrations.
- /desktop/overview/ - Desktop overview.
- /desktop/first-10-minutes/ - First 10 minutes with Tandem Desktop.
- /desktop/workflows/ - Desktop workflows.
- /desktop/settings-and-safety/ - Settings and safety.
- /desktop/learn-walkthroughs/ - Interactive Learn walkthroughs.
- /desktop/troubleshooting/ - Desktop troubleshooting.
- /desktop/headless-deployment/ - Headless deployment from desktop workflows.

## Developer and automation docs

- /tandem-wow-demo-playbook/ - How agents should turn Tandem docs and engine contracts into showcase workflow and automation payloads.
- /mcp-automated-agents/ - Automated agent workflows and MCP patterns.
- /agent-workflow-mission-quickstart/ - Short checklist for agents creating, running, and maintaining Tandem workflows or missions.
- /choosing-providers-and-models-for-agents/ - How agents should choose providers, defaults, and per-stage model overrides.
- /prompting-workflows-and-missions/ - How to prompt Tandem workflows, missions, and staged recurring operations.
- /creating-and-running-workflows-and-missions/ - Which Tandem path to use and how to create, apply, schedule, and run it.
- /engine-authentication-for-agents/ - How to obtain an engine token and authenticate SDK or HTTP calls.
- /webmcp-for-agents/ - Local HTTP APIs for agents.
- /autonomous-coding-agents-github-projects/ - GitHub Projects coding-agent workflows.
- /browser-setup-and-testing/ - Browser setup, install, and validation.
- /sdk/ - SDK landing page.
- /sdk/typescript/ - TypeScript SDK.
- /sdk/python/ - Python SDK.
- /sdk/scheduling-automations/ - SDK automation scheduling.

## Architecture and reference

- /architecture/ - System architecture overview.
- /protocol-matrix/ - Protocol and compatibility matrix.
- /engine-testing/ - Engine testing guidance.
- /reference/engine-commands/ - Engine CLI commands.
- /reference/tui-commands/ - TUI commands.
- /reference/tools/ - Tool API reference.
- /reference/spawn-policy/ - Spawn policy and safety rules.
- /reference/agent-team-api/ - Agent-team HTTP API.
- /reference/agent-team-events/ - Agent-team event stream contract.

## If you need a quick pointer

- Want setup? Start with `/start-here/` and `/installation/`.
- Want to run Tandem as a service? Use `/headless-service/`.
- Want to understand orchestration? Read `/agents-and-sessions/` and `/agent-teams/`.
- Want to build integrations? Use `/mcp-automated-agents/`, `/webmcp-for-agents/`, and the SDK pages.
- Want the shortest reliable checklist? Start with `/agent-workflow-mission-quickstart/`.
- Need help picking providers or model policies? Use `/choosing-providers-and-models-for-agents/`.
- Want to generate strong workflow or mission specs? Start with `/prompting-workflows-and-missions/`.
- Want a ready-made showcase payload playbook? Start with `/tandem-wow-demo-playbook/`.
- Want to know which engine path to call next? Use `/creating-and-running-workflows-and-missions/`.
- Need the token and auth pattern first? Use `/engine-authentication-for-agents/`.
- Want low-level behavior? Use the `/reference/` pages and `/protocol-matrix/`.

## External

- https://github.com/frumu-ai/tandem
- https://webmcp.dev/
